zh.lifeSummary: 當David IV of Strathbogie 12th Earl of Atholl於1332年出生在英國諾圖波藍德費爾頓時，他的父親David III of Strathbogie 11th Earl of Atholl23歲，母親Catherine de Beaumont22歲。他於1356年7月18日之前與Elizabeth de Ferrers在英國萊希斯特斯爾格洛比結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於1369年10月10日在英國肯特布拉布恩享年37歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当David IV of Strathbogie 12th Earl of Atholl于1332年出生在英国諾圖波藍德費爾頓时，他的父亲David III of Strathbogie 11th Earl of Atholl23岁，母亲Catherine de Beaumont22岁。他于1356年7月18日之前与Elizabeth de Ferrers在英国萊希斯特斯爾格洛比结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。他去世于1369年10月10日在英国肯特布拉布恩享年37岁。

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: possibly a metonymic occupational name for a fisherman, from orfe, a species of freshwater fish. Alternatively, a habitational name from Urff near Kassel, formerly Orpha.

nameMeanings.name: David
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the greatest of all the kings of Israel, whose history is recounted with great vividness in the first and second books of Samuel and elsewhere. As a boy he killed the giant Philistine Goliath with his slingshot. As king of Judah, and later of all Israel, he expanded the power of the Israelites and established the security of their kingdom. He was also noted as a poet, many of the Psalms being attributed to him. The Hebrew derivation of the name is uncertain; it is said by some to represent a nursery word meaning ‘darling’. It is a very popular Jewish name, but is almost equally common among Gentiles in the English-speaking world. It is particularly common in Wales and Scotland, having been borne by the patron saint of Wales (  see  Dewi   ) and by two medieval kings of Scotland.

nameMeanings.name: IV
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: probably a contracted form of  Jep , vernacular form of   Jacob   .

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When David IV of Strathbogie 12th Earl of Atholl was born in 1332, in Felton, Northumberland, England, his father, David III of Strathbogie 11th Earl of Atholl, was 23 and his mother, Catherine de Beaumont, was 22. He married Elizabeth de Ferrers before 18 July 1356, in Groby, Leicestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died on 10 October 1369, in Brabourne, Kent, England, at the age of 37.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque David IV of Strathbogie 12th Earl of Atholl est né en 1332, à Felton, Northumberland, Angleterre, son père, David III of Strathbogie 11th Earl of Atholl, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Catherine de Beaumont, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth de Ferrers avant 18 juillet 1356, à Groby, Leicestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Il est décédé le 10 octobre 1369, à Brabourne, Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 37 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als David IV of Strathbogie 12th Earl of Atholl 1332 in Felton, Northumberland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater David III of Strathbogie 11th Earl of Atholl 23 und seine Mutter Catherine de Beaumont 22. Er hat vor 18. Juli 1356 in Groby, Leicestershire, England Elizabeth de Ferrers geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb am 10. Oktober 1369 im Alter von 37 Jahren in Brabourne, Kent, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando David IV of Strathbogie 12th Earl of Atholl è nato il nel 1332 nel Felton, Northumberland, England, il suo padre, David III of Strathbogie 11th Earl of Atholl, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Catherine de Beaumont, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth de Ferrers prima del 18 luglio 1356, nel Groby, Leicestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì il 10 ottobre 1369, nel Brabourne, Kent, England, all'età di 37 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: David IV of Strathbogie 12th Earl of Athollが1332年にイギリスノースウンバーランドフエルトンで生まれた時，父David III of Strathbogie 11th Earl of Athollは23歳，母Catherine de Beaumontは22歳であった。1356年7月18日以前にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアグロビーでElizabeth de Ferrersと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼は1369年10月10日にイギリスケントブラボウルンで37歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: David IV of Strathbogie 12th Earl of Atholl(이)가 1332년 영국 노르스벌랜드 프턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 David III of Strathbogie 11th Earl of Atholl(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Catherine de Beaumont(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1356년 7월 18일 이전 영국 레이스스터실르 그로비에서 Elizabeth de Ferrers(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1369년 10월 10일 영국 켄트 브라보우른에서 37세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Aberargie, Perth Council area, Perth, Sc: Aberargie, Siorrachd Pheairt, Шотланд, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando David IV of Strathbogie 12th Earl of Atholl nasceu em 1332, em Felton, Northumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, David III of Strathbogie 11th Earl of Atholl, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Catherine de Beaumont, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth de Ferrers antes 18 de julho de 1356, em Groby, Leicestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 10 de outubro de 1369, em Brabourne, Kent, Inglaterra, com 37 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда David IV of Strathbogie 12th Earl of Atholl родился в 1332 г. в местности фелтон, нортумбирланд, Англия, его отцу по имени David III of Strathbogie 11th Earl of Atholl было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Catherine de Beaumont, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth de Ferrers перед 18 июля 1356 г. в местности гроби, лисестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер 10 октября 1369 г. в местности брабурн, кэнт, Англия в возрасте 37 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando David IV of Strathbogie 12th Earl of Atholl nació en 1332, en Felton, Northumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, David III of Strathbogie 11th Earl of Atholl, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Catherine de Beaumont, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Elizabeth de Ferrers antes de 18 de julio de 1356, en Groby, Leicestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió el 10 de octubre de 1369, en Brabourne, Kent, Inglaterra, a la edad de 37 años.
